HGSS.550.0000:
Falkner: I’m Falkner, the Violet City
Pokémon Gym Leader!\f
People say you can clip Flying-type
Pokémon’s wings with a jolt\r
of electricity...\f
I won’t allow such insults to bird
Pokémon!\f
I’ll show you the real power of the
magnificent bird Pokémon!\f
HGSS.550.0001:
Falkner: ...For pity’s sake!
My dad’s cherished bird Pokémon...\f
But a defeat is a defeat.
All right.\f
Take this official Pokémon
League Badge.\r
This one is the Zephyr Badge.\f
HGSS.550.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Zephyr Badge from Falkner!
HGSS.550.0003:
Falkner: With that Badge, Pokémon,
including traded Pokémon up to Lv. 20,\r
will obey you without question.\f
It also enables you to use the hidden
move Rock Smash anytime outside\r
of battle.\f
HGSS.550.0004:
Falkner: By using a TM, a Pokémon will
instantly learn a new move.\f
Think before you act--a TM can be
used only once.\f
TM51 contains Roost.
It restores half the max HP.\f
There are Pokémon Gyms in cities and
towns ahead. Make good use of them!\f
As for your next move...\r
I would suggest Azalea Town.
HGSS.550.0005:
Falkner: There are Pokémon Gyms in
cities and towns ahead.\f
You should test your skills at
these Gyms.\f
As for your next move...\r
I would suggest Azalea Town.\f
I’m going to train harder to become
the greatest Bird Keeper of all!
HGSS.550.0006:
Yo! Champ in the making!
You must be here to challenge\r
Falkner, the Gym Leader, right?\f
You are quite welcome.
...Almost!\f
This city has a tower called the
Sprout Tower where Trainers\r
come to train themselves.\f
Challenging Falkner may be too
difficult if you haven’t gone through\r
their training.\r
Ha ha ha!
HGSS.550.0007:
Yo, Champ in the making!
I’m no Trainer, but I can give\r
some advice!\r
Believe me!\r
If you believe, then a Championship\r
dream can come true.\f
You believe?
Then listen.\f
The Grass type is weak against the
Flying type. Keep this in mind.
HGSS.550.0008:
Nice battle! Keep it up, and you’ll
be the Champ in no time at all!
HGSS.550.0010:
Violet City Pokémon Gym\f
Gym Leader: Falkner
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
